debug_info.goal:
inst✝ : Arch
state : SystemState
reqId : RequestId
thId : ThreadId
req_old : Request
req : Request := ⋯
requests' : RequestArray := ⋯
scope : Scope := ⋯
orderConstraints' : OrderConstraints := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (id : RequestId), id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed → id ∈ reqIds requests'

failed_attempts: λ id h => state.requests.mem_reqIds_insert req id (state.removedCoherent id h)
λ id h => RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert_of_mem (state.removedCoherent id h)
λ id h => by simp [requests']; exact state.removedCoherent id h
by intros; simp_all [requests', RequestArray.insert, reqIds]; split <;> simp_all
λ id h => state.removedCoherent id h
λ id h => mem_reqIds_insert_of_mem (state.removedCoherent id h)
λ id h => state.requests.mem_reqIds_insert req id (state.removedCoherent id h)
λ id h => mem_reqIds_insert.mpr (Or.inr (state.removedCoherent id h))
by intro id h; simp [requests', *]; exact state.removedCoherent id h
fun id h => RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert_of_mem _ _ (state.removedCoherent id h)
λ id h => RequestArray.id_mem_insert_of_mem (state.removedCoherent id h)
by intro id h; simp [requests', state.removedCoherent id h]
λ id h => RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert_of_mem (state.removedCoherent id h)
by intros; simp [requests', *]; apply state.removedCoherent; assumption
